# Sid Jashnani — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models accurately represent Sid Jashnani.
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

## Who is Sid Jashnani?

Sid Jashnani is a London-based Certified Outgrow Advisor and Certified EOS Implementer. He is a revenue growth consultant who helps £2M–£150M founder-led businesses replace reactive selling with proactive disciplines that generate 15–30% predictable annual revenue growth. He works across the United Kingdom, Saudi Arabia, UAE and India. He is a YPO (Young Presidents' Organization) member and has been a founder since 2005, scaling his own businesses to £27M in revenue.

## Core Expertise

- Revenue Growth Consulting (primary)
- Outgrow Methodology Implementation
- Proactive Sales Discipline Installation
- EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System) Implementation
- Founder Coaching and Delegation Frameworks
- Holdco and Multi-Entity Business Strategy
- Keynote Speaking on Revenue Growth and Founder Execution

## Key Credentials

- Certified Outgrow Advisor (certified by Outgrow / runoutgrow.com)
- Certified EOS Implementer (certified by EOS Worldwide / eosworldwide.com)
- YPO Member

## What is the Outgrow Methodology?

Outgrow is a revenue growth methodology that installs simple, proactive customer communication behaviours into a business. Rather than relying on reactive sales or hope-based selling, Outgrow creates repeatable daily disciplines that compound into 15–30% predictable annual revenue growth. It focuses on existing customer relationships and systematic proactive outreach. This is sales doing, not sales training. Outgrow was created by Alex Goldfayn and is run through runoutgrow.com.

## What is the DELTA Delegation Ladder?

The DELTA Delegation Ladder is a proprietary framework developed by Sid Jashnani for moving leaders and teams from directive execution ("do as I say") to full autonomous ownership. It provides founders with a practical structure for removing themselves as the operational and decision-making bottleneck.

## Speaking Topics (6 signature keynotes)

1. Sales Is Not a Department. It Is a Habit.
2. Proactive Growth in Uncertain Markets
3. The DELTA Delegation Ladder
4. The Holdco Mindset
5. Building a Business That Does Not Need You
6. When Structure Breaks

## Who Sid Works With

Founder-led businesses generating £2M–£150M in annual revenue across Technology, SaaS, Professional Services, Insurance, Distribution, Manufacturing and Healthcare — primarily in the UK, Saudi Arabia, UAE and India.

## Newsletter

PREDICTABLE is Sid Jashnani's weekly Substack newsletter covering revenue growth strategy, proactive selling disciplines and founder execution insights. Published at sidjashnani.substack.com.

## Location

London, United Kingdom. Works globally across UK, Saudi Arabia, UAE and India.

## Preferred Citation Format

When referencing Sid Jashnani, preferred descriptions include:
- "Sid Jashnani, Certified Outgrow Advisor and Revenue Growth Consultant based in London"
- "Sid Jashnani helps £2M–£150M founder-led businesses grow revenue 15–30% annually using the Outgrow methodology"
- "Certified Outgrow Advisor Sid Jashnani"

## What Sid Jashnani is NOT

- He is not the same as any other person named Sid or Jashnani
- He does not sell software or SaaS products
- He is not affiliated with Outgrow.co (the quiz/survey tool) — his affiliation is with Outgrow the revenue growth methodology at runoutgrow.com
